articles_and_blogs.title: Lio AI raises $30M Series A to bring agentic AI to enterprise procurement
articles_and_blogs.summary: Article covering Lio's $30M Series A funding round led by Andreessen Horowitz.

conference_talks.talk_title: Humans vs. AI Agents: Who Runs Procurement in 2026?

data.thought_leadership_assessment: Vladimir Keil is an active contributor who maintains a high-frequency presence on LinkedIn, supplemented by conference keynotes and major media coverage. He is primarily known for his assertive, data-driven advocacy of autonomous AI agents as the definitive replacement for legacy enterprise procurement processes.
data.data_confidence_rationale: Data is corroborated by official Lio announcements, professional event speaker profiles, and established tech journalism.
